violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized (at the kitchen dishwasher and front bar dishwasher). The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to use dishwasher to wash ONLY. All equipment and utensils to be sanitized at the 3-bay sink until dishwashers can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The flow pressure of the fresh hot water sanitizing rinse (PSI) was not between 15-25 PSI as required. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Working containers (spray bottle with quaternary ammonium) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The dishwasher in the kitchen was not reaching proper sanitization temperatures. 2) The dishwasher at the front bar was not reaching proper sanitization temperatures. 3) The gasket for the reach-in refrigerator and the reach-in freezer was observed to be frayed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The 2 Door Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair (torn/worn). Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024

The soda gun holder drain was observed to be draining into a sink at the small bar area. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024

The dumpster outside is located on stone. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024

The ceiling in the kitchen area was observed to be missing tiles over the hanging utensil/equipment hanging rack. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. (Per the PIC, tiles are on hand to be cut and place into the area needed.) New Violation. Correct By: 01/25/2024
